case_title: BEVERLY STEMACH VS. NICOLE HODGE et al

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY FULLY SATISFIED AS TO PLAINTIFF'S POSSESSION ONLY AND WITH ACCRUED COST OF $85.00. AS TO DEFENDANT HODGE, NICOLE
